title: Head-to-Toe Assessment (H2T)
description: NKBDS H2T head-to-toe assessment workbook — grouped by body system and sub-system.

choices.label: Physically threatening or aggressive (Combative or Defiant)

WDL= Appropriate to the situation, cooperative, appropriate eye contact; no unusual gestures, mannerisms or speech; no socially inappropriate behavior, verbal or physical aggressiveness toward self or others

WDL= Behavior appropriate to the situation, cooperative, appropriate eye contact; no unusual gestures, mannerisms or speech; no socially inappropriate behavior, verbal or physical aggressiveness toward self or others.  Mood and affect appropriate for situation; affect consistent with mood; no agitation, anxiety, euphoria, lability. Thought Process:  Thought processes appropriate to situation, logical, relevant; no delusions and hallucinations; no spontaneous self-reported suicidal thoughts (not asked q shift, full suicide assessment via risk tool)
WDL= Mood and affect appropriate for situation; affect consistent with mood; no agitation, anxiety, euphoria, lability

WDL=  Thought processes appropriate to situation, logical, relevant; no delusions and hallucinations; no spontaneous self-reported suicidal thoughts (not asked q shift, full suicide assessment via risk tool)
No cardiac symptoms. Regular rate.  S1, S2, no adventitious heart sounds.
WDL= S1S2, no adventitious heart sounds
WDL= Abdomen soft, non-tender, non-distended unless gravid
WDL= Bowel sounds audible, bowel movements per patient's baseline
Abdomen non-tender, non-distended and soft unless gravid.  Bowel sounds audible, bowel movements per patient's baseline.  No subjective GI symptoms reported (output is not documented here)
WDL= No involuntary movements in head and face

No bleeding, trauma, drainage, congestion, dryness, redness, swelling, or tenderness. Mucosa and lips intact.  Neck symmetrical, soft.  No acute hearing changes, tinnitus or ear obstruction.  No involuntary movements in head and face.  Sclera white, no eye drooping, no acute vision change. Voice intact
WDL = No drainage, Redness, swelling, obstruction.  No acute hearing changes
WDL = Sclera white, No trauma, burning, drainage, drooping, dryness, Redness, swelling, acute vision change
WDL = Skin and mucosa intact; No swelling, lesion(s), drainage, difficulty chewing
WDL = Neck soft, voice intact, no masses, swelling, or tenderness
WDL = No drainage, congestion, dryness, postnasal drip.  No involuntary movements in head and face
WDL = No drainage, Redness, swelling, obstruction.  No acute hearing changes
WDL = Sclera white, No trauma, burning, drainage, drooping, dryness, swelling, edema, acute vision change
WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.

items.prompt: Foot or Toes Musculoskeletal Additional Assessment L

choices.label: WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL= Less than, equal to 3 seconds
WDL= Appropriate, even tone.  No generalized skin abnormalities.
+ 3 = Deep pitting, indentation remains for a short time
+ 4 = Very Deep pitting, indentiation lasts a long time
0 out of 5 No visible muscle movement
WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL = Less than, equal to 3 seconds
WDL= Appropriate, even tone.  No generalized skin abnormalities.
+ 3 = Deep pitting, indentation remains for a short time
+ 4 = Very Deep pitting, indentiation lasts a long time
0 out of 5 no visible muscle movement
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.

items.prompt: Hand or Fingers Musculoskeletal Additional Assessment L

choices.label: WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL =No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness or injury in extremities, ankles, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
Long term memory loss noted or reported
Short term memory loss noted or reported

Alert, oriented x4.  Appropriate for age.  Face is symmetrical.  Follows commands, no memory loss noted or reported (document formal memory assessment separately if completed). No difficulities swallowing.  Pupils equal, reactive, and round.  Speech is clear.

All extremities with full 5 out of 5 and equal strength and range of motion. Capillary refill time less than, equal to 3 seconds. Pulses +3 palpable. No edema, pain, weakness, numbness and tingling, sensation intact
WDL=Unlabored, no shortness of breath, no retractions
WDL= Chest excursion and trachea symmetrical.  No cough.  No sputum.  Clear lung sounds.  Unlabored, no shortness of breath, no retractions.  Regular respiratory pattern.

items.prompt: Hand or Fingers Musculoskelatal Additional Assessment R

choices.label: WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL =No swelling, pain, weakness or injury in extremities, ankles, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, and wrists.  Full range of motion.
WDL= Warm, dry, intact, with appropriate, even tone. No generalized skin abnormalities. No minor skin integrity findings (see table).  Major skin findings documented in LDA.
WDL = Appropriate, even tone, No generalized skin abnormalities

items.prompt: Skin Integrity Exceptions (Minor findings when LDA not needed)

choices.label: Rash (including as more general term than hives)
WDL= Warm, dry, intact, with appropriate, even tone. No generalized skin abnormalities. No minor skin integrity findings (see table).  Major skin findings documented in LDA.
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness or injury in C-spine.  Full range of motion
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness or injury in L-spine.  Full range of motion
WDL = No swelling, pain, weakness or injury in back.  Full range of motion
WDL = No symptoms reported  (output is documented in I/0, use Zero in I/o for anuria, bladder scanner results in I/O, incontinence might also be in I/O...needs discussion or keep here?)
